title: No-duplicate Governance Map

existing_modules_to_consume_not_duplicat.existing_responsibility: Article intelligence, quality readiness, long-form readiness and closure.
existing_modules_to_consume_not_duplicat.ag46_position: Consume as source-of-truth; do not recreate article-quality governance.

existing_modules_to_consume_not_duplicat.existing_responsibility: Daily Signal Surface, First Light, daily signal selection, title/subtitle metadata, video and backend pattern planning.
existing_modules_to_consume_not_duplicat.ag46_position: Consume only where Featured Reads needs signal/reference learning; do not recreate Daily Signal Surface.

existing_modules_to_consume_not_duplicat.existing_responsibility: Reference, visual credit and attribution cleanup family.
existing_modules_to_consume_not_duplicat.ag46_position: Consume for Featured Reads reference and visual-credit production readiness; do not create a parallel credit module.

existing_modules_to_consume_not_duplicat.existing_responsibility: Article width and reading surface layout family.
existing_modules_to_consume_not_duplicat.ag46_position: Consume for layout/readability carry-forward; do not create a parallel layout module.

no_duplicate_rule: AG46A starts Featured Reads Production Strengthening as a delta hardening chain only.
